questionHtml: Suggest two reasons, other than mate selection, for variation in plumage colouration in red knots.
markschemeHtml:
1. camouflage to avoid predators (in different migratory routes);
  2. different diets (in different migratory routes);
  3. less migratory distance leaves more energy to produce pigments (in plumage);
  4. geographic isolation (due to different migratory routes) leads to different gene pools;

meta.title: Suggest two reasons, other than mate selection, for variation in plumage colouration in red knots.
breadcrumbLabels: D4.1.7. Sexual selection as a selection pressure in animal species
